title: dubautia arborea
intro: Dubautia arborea, also known as the Ma'o hau hele or yellow composite, is a rare and endangered Hawaiian plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Dubautia arborea has been found to have potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Dubautia arborea can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
